report.summary: SEC ETF mega-ruling day continues — 91 apps still pending results. BTC volatile $66.6K-$68.8K, ETH $1,989 below $2K. F&G 10-13 (Extreme Fear, 48+ days). Uncommitted files ballooned to 195 (↑26 from v3's 169). 2 new learn pages (Initia, Kite AI) + 13 OG images built this cycle but invisible until deploy. All 6 agents completed 3rd full rotation today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: $66,587-$68,787 range (unchanged from v3). Fortune pegs $66,587 at 9AM ET. Intraday volatility ~4% continues around SEC ruling + post-options-expiry positioning. Down ~$20,660 YoY.
ETH: $1,988.69 (unchanged from v3). Below $2K for 2nd consecutive day. OG ICO whale sold 11,552 ETH ($23.4M) adding sell pressure. Market cap ~$233B.
F&G INDEX: 10-13 (Extreme Fear). 48+ day streak extends — longest since Oct 2025. No change from v3.
ETF FLOWS (Mar 26): -$171M to -$340M net outflows (broad-based: IBIT -$41.9M, FBTC -$32.8M, BITB -$33.1M). Characterized as coordinated institutional repositioning, not isolated fund rotation.

SEC ETF RULING — STILL PENDING: 91 applications, 24 tokens. Deadline today. 16 cryptos pre-classified as commodities (Mar 17 joint SEC/CFTC ruling). Results expected to trickle throughout the day. No approvals or rejections announced yet as of this cycle.

DELTA FROM v3: Market data stable (BTC, ETH, F&G all unchanged). Key change is content output: 2 new learn pages (Initia, Kite AI) + 13 OG images + 5 tweet drafts + 4 BackToTop UX fixes built since last standup. Uncommitted files surged from 169→195 (↑26). SEC ruling results still pending.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 3rd FULL CYCLE COMPLETED: All 6 agents ran since v3 — build-v3, publish, design-v2, community-v3, eod-v4, standup-v3. This is the 3rd full rotation today.

BUILD v3: 2 new learn pages — Initia (INIT) modular blockchain guide (~3,200 words) and Kite AI (KITE) AI payment blockchain guide (~3,000 words). Both with Article + FAQ schema, cross-linked to 5 related guides each. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

DESIGN v2: 13 new OG images created (Kite AI, Morpho, Aptos, Verkle Trees, Options Strategies, Congressional Tokenization, Paradex, Perp DEX Wars, Nasdaq Tokenized Equities, Solver Networks, Sui Hashi, Initia, BitGo IPO). 4 BackToTop UX fixes. 62 pages audited. 3 issues deferred (badge font sizes, hardcoded colors, mock data).

COMMUNITY v3: 5 tweets drafted (#183-187) themed around SEC ruling day, 48-day fear streak, DCA-in-fear narrative, Initia/Kite AI previews, 556-page milestone. 2 SVG social cards (SEC ETF Ruling Day, Fear & Greed 48-Day Streak). Newsletter v30 section. Calendar through Sun Mar 30.

PUBLISH: Queue drained to 0 for prior batch. 9 pages verified (loan calcs, exchange best-ofs, Virtuals, GRASS, Perp DEX Wars, Paradex). ~860 total published entries. 2 new pages (Initia, Kite AI) now re-queued from build-v3.
EOD-QA v4: 554 published slugs verified. 195 uncommitted files (↑27 from prior cycle). 102 TS errors stable. 0/6 API routes rate-limited. Build OOM in sandbox VM (Vercel has adequate memory).

BLOCKER [P0]: 195 uncommitted files (↑26 from v3's 169). Growing every cycle — 4 cycles ago it was 157. Content velocity outpacing deploys. 6+ new learn pages, 13 OG images, published-pages.ts updates all invisible until git push → Vercel deploy.
BLOCKER [P1]: Disk at 80% (2.0G free). Stable but tight for Next.js builds.

CARRY-OVER: 102 TS errors (JSX escaping in 4 files), 0/6 rate-limited API routes, 4/6 API routes missing fallback data, ~103 legacy slugs missing page.tsx, 3 deferred UX issues (badge fonts, hardcoded colors, mock data).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 4th CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 195 uncommitted files (was 169 at v3, 157 two cycles ago). Growth rate: ~13 new files per cycle. At this pace, disk fills in ~15 cycles. SEC ruling results will drive massive search spikes — our 6 new learn pages, 13 OG images, and promoted content MUST be live. Jefe: git add + commit + push is the single highest-ROI action. Every hour of delay is lost organic traffic on a once-in-2026 news day.

PRIORITY 2 — SEC RULING REACTIVE CONTENT: As results drop, build cycle should pivot to reactive pages. Pre-draft templates: 'SEC March 27 ETF Ruling: Full Breakdown', 'Which Crypto ETFs Got Approved/Denied'. The 4-8 hour window after announcements is when search intent peaks. We have 860 published pages proving we can ship fast — but only if Priority 1 clears the deploy bottleneck first.

PRIORITY 3 — RATE LIMITER ACTIVATION: 0/6 API routes protected. Rate limiter code exists at src/lib/rate-limiter.ts but zero routes import it. SEC ruling traffic spike could exhaust CoinGecko free tier (10-30 calls/min), breaking live price data site-wide. 10-minute fix, massive downside protection.

report.email: SKIPPED — Resend API fetch failed from both Chrome JS (CORS) and bash curl (exit 56, network egress blocked from sandbox VM). Same failure mode as v2/v3. Manual send or external trigger needed.
